item.title: US Govt. Lab Launches Advanced Battery Lab To Help Power Grid
item.description:
US Govt. Lab Launches Advanced Battery Lab To Help Power Grid

The new line is
item.content:encoded:
US Govt. Lab Launches Advanced Battery Lab To Help Power Grid

The new line is
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: EU Could Lose 1.3 Million Jobs Due To Energy Price Surge From Iran War
item.description:
EU Could Lose 1.3 Million Jobs Due To Energy Price Surge From Iran War

Up to 1.3 million jobs across the EU are at risk because of the ongoing war in the Middle East, European Commissioner for jobs Roxana Mînzatu said on Wednesday.

"Due to the war in the Middle East, up to 1.3 million jobs are at risk, particularly in energy-intensive industries," Mînzatu said at a press conference.
item.content:encoded:
EU Could Lose 1.3 Million Jobs Due To Energy Price Surge From Iran War

Up to 1.3 million jobs across the EU are at risk because of the ongoing war in the Middle East, European Commissioner for jobs Roxana Mînzatu said on Wednesday.

"Due to the war in the Middle East, up to 1.3 million jobs are at risk, particularly in energy-intensive industries," Mînzatu said at a press conference.
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: [Federal Register] Special Local Regulation; Ohio River Mile Marker 90-91, Wheeling, WV
item.description: The Coast Guard is establishing a temporary special local regulation on the waters of the Ohio River from mile marker 90 to mile marker 91 in Wheeling, WV. This action is necessary to provide for the safety of life on these navigable waters from potential hazards during the Wheeling Water Ski Show for the activities planned on June 7, 2026. This rulemaking would prohibit persons and vessels from being in the one-mile regulated area unless authorized by the Captain of the Port Pittsburgh or a des
item.content:encoded: The Coast Guard is establishing a temporary special local regulation on the waters of the Ohio River from mile marker 90 to mile marker 91 in Wheeling, WV. This action is necessary to provide for the safety of life on these navigable waters from potential hazards during the Wheeling Water Ski Show for the activities planned on June 7, 2026. This rulemaking would prohibit persons and vessels from being in the one-mile regulated area unless authorized by the Captain of the Port Pittsburgh or a des
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Sean Strickland has been BANNED from attending the UFC white house fights, for stating that Donald Trump is owned by Israel
item.description: submitted by
item.content:encoded: submitted by
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Samsung Joins Blue-State Exodus, Moves U.S. HQ From New Jersey To Texas
item.description:
Samsung Joins Blue-State Exodus, Moves U.S. HQ From New Jersey To Texas

We're still trying to settle on a name for the new "Rust Belt" for blue states, where high taxes, de-growth climate policies, permitting paralysis, and an obsession with woke governance have sparked a historic outflow of people, businesses, and capital to red states.

The old Rust Belt was hollowed out by decades of deindustrialization. This new version in blue states is being hollowed out by sel
item.content:encoded:
Samsung Joins Blue-State Exodus, Moves U.S. HQ From New Jersey To Texas

We're still trying to settle on a name for the new "Rust Belt" for blue states, where high taxes, de-growth climate policies, permitting paralysis, and an obsession with woke governance have sparked a historic outflow of people, businesses, and capital to red states.

The old Rust Belt was hollowed out by decades of deindustrialization. This new version in blue states is being hollowed out by sel
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: House Passes Dem Resolution to Block U.S. Military Action Against Iran In Narrow Vote
item.description:
House Passes Dem Resolution to Block U.S. Military Action Against Iran In Narrow Vote

The U.S. House of Representatives passed a resolution on June 3 directing the withdrawal of U.S. troops from armed hostilities with Iran, in a closely divided 215–208 vote.

Four Republicans joined Democrats in supporting the measure, w
item.content:encoded:
House Passes Dem Resolution to Block U.S. Military Action Against Iran In Narrow Vote

The U.S. House of Representatives passed a resolution on June 3 directing the withdrawal of U.S. troops from armed hostilities with Iran, in a closely divided 215–208 vote.

Four Republicans joined Democrats in supporting the measure, w
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Iran Issues 4-Stage Proposal For Deal With US, After Most Intense Overnight Clashes Since April
item.description:
Iran Issues 4-Stage Proposal For Deal With US, After Most Intense Overnight Clashes Since April

Summary

  • State media issues four-stage proposal for deal with US, says indirect talks are 'ongoing'.
  • GCC blasts 'cowardly attacks' after Kuwait International Airport rocked by Iranian missiles: one dead, 63 injured.
  • Overnight saw US-Iran exchange fire in Strait of Horm
item.content:encoded:
Iran Issues 4-Stage Proposal For Deal With US, After Most Intense Overnight Clashes Since April

Summary

  • State media issues four-stage proposal for deal with US, says indirect talks are 'ongoing'.
  • GCC blasts 'cowardly attacks' after Kuwait International Airport rocked by Iranian missiles: one dead, 63 injured.
  • Overnight saw US-Iran exchange fire in Strait of Horm
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Facebook again...
item.description: Ok, I know I should not use FB but unfortunately I have to. So, I have installed it on a factory reset burner, dedicated proton mail, nothing else on the device. I have given false information to FB regarding myself, all locations are off, the device stays at home in a filing cabinet. So imagine my surprise when I receive a VERY targeted ad from a heating oil company includ
item.content:encoded: Ok, I know I should not use FB but unfortunately I have to. So, I have installed it on a factory reset burner, dedicated proton mail, nothing else on the device. I have given false information to FB regarding myself, all locations are off, the device stays at home in a filing cabinet. So imagine my surprise when I receive a VERY targeted ad from a heating oil company includ
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Federal Inspection Reportedly Finds Delaney Hall In Compliance On Virtually All Standards
item.description:
Federal Inspection Reportedly Finds Delaney Hall In Compliance On Virtually All Standards

As is often the case, there is a closed loop of information fueling such claims. The media ran allegations from advocacy groups, politicians repeated the media reports as fact, and then lawyers cited both as the basis for a lawsuit to shut down the site. The problem is
item.content:encoded:
Federal Inspection Reportedly Finds Delaney Hall In Compliance On Virtually All Standards

As is often the case, there is a closed loop of information fueling such claims. The media ran allegations from advocacy groups, politicians repeated the media reports as fact, and then lawyers cited both as the basis for a lawsuit to shut down the site. The problem is
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Amazon Reaches $2.5 Billion Settlement Over Allegations It Misled Prime Users

item.content:encoded: Amazon Reaches $2.5 Billion Settlement Over Allegations It Misled Prime Users WSJ
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Age Verification is a Privacy Nightmare
item.description:
We all want young people to be safe online, but we don’t need to trade everyone's digital rights to achieve it. These new restrictive mandates are used to justify government-led censorship and expanded surveillance. That's no accident.

Whether you trust today’s lawmakers or not, handing anyone keys to new forms of censorship and surveillance is a serious risk. Becaus
item.content:encoded:
We all want young people to be safe online, but we don’t need to trade everyone's digital rights to achieve it. These new restrictive mandates are used to justify government-led censorship and expanded surveillance. That's no accident.

Whether you trust today’s lawmakers or not, handing anyone keys to new forms of censorship and surveillance is a serious risk. Becaus
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: North Carolinian under 14 ban that requires age verification (House Bill 301) passes house with bipartisan support and is now under consideration in the senate judiciary committee.
item.description:
edit: I mean under 14 social media ban

I couldn't get access the the original bill due it to being blocked for some reason, so sorry for not being able to provide a link.

An article explaining it:

item.title: Donald Trump is the conspiracy.
item.description:
Forget the distractions. The biggest one is right in front of us.

Crypto Empire Built on Foreign Money:Days before his second inauguration, a UAE royal (Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed Al Nahyan, the country’s national security adviser) secretly bought a 49% stake in the Trump family’s World Liberty Financial for $500 million. This routed $187 million directly to Trump fami
item.content:encoded:
Forget the distractions. The biggest one is right in front of us.

Crypto Empire Built on Foreign Money:Days before his second inauguration, a UAE royal (Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed Al Nahyan, the country’s national security adviser) secretly bought a 49% stake in the Trump family’s World Liberty Financial for $500 million. This routed $187 million directly to Trump fami
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Quote of the day by Oracle co-founder Larry Ellison: "Citizens will be on their best behavior, because we’re constantly recording and reporting everything that is going on" — a dire warning on the erosion of privacy

item.content:encoded: submitted by   <a   <span><a href="

item.title: Early Returns Show Surprises In California As Other States Wrap Up
item.description:
Early Returns Show Surprises In California As Other States Wrap Up

Update (0030ET): Voters in six states went to the polls today for key primaries. While many races followed expectations, California delivered notable early drama with slow-counting mail ballots still to come.

California Governor (Top-Two Primary)

The race to replace term-limited Gov. Gavin Newsom remains the biggest story. In a crowded nonpartisan jungle primary,
item.content:encoded:
Early Returns Show Surprises In California As Other States Wrap Up

Update (0030ET): Voters in six states went to the polls today for key primaries. While many races followed expectations, California delivered notable early drama with slow-counting mail ballots still to come.

California Governor (Top-Two Primary)

The race to replace term-limited Gov. Gavin Newsom remains the biggest story. In a crowded nonpartisan jungle primary,
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: GameStop Discloses First Quarter 2026 Results
item.dc:creator: Jordan Ames

item.title: DOGE 15m short setup: risk-defined scalp, not a prediction
item.description:
This is the kind of crypto setup where I care more about invalidation than direction.

The short idea is simple: price rejected near the local high, momentum weakened, and the breakdown candle gave a possible continuation setup. But the grade is not amazing, so I would not treat this like a high-conviction call.

What matter
item.content:encoded:
This is the kind of crypto setup where I care more about invalidation than direction.

The short idea is simple: price rejected near the local high, momentum weakened, and the breakdown candle gave a possible continuation setup. But the grade is not amazing, so I would not treat this like a high-conviction call.

What matter
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Amazon Prime $2.5 billion settlement: Here's how to claim a refund
item.description: Amazon Prime $2.5 billion settlement: Here's how to claim a refund LiveNOW from FOX
item.content:encoded: Amazon Prime $2.5 billion settlement: Here's how to claim a refund LiveNOW from FOX
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: I built an AI assistant that runs fully offline on a USB stick. No cloud, no account, nothing leaves your machine
item.description:
I got tired of "private" AI tools that still route everything through someone else's
server, so over the last year I built the opposite: a self-contained AI assistant that
lives entirely on a USB stick and runs fully offline on Windows.

The whole point is that it can't leak what it never sends. Put the machine in airplane
mode, unplug the network — it
item.content:encoded:
I got tired of "private" AI tools that still route everything through someone else's
server, so over the last year I built the opposite: a self-contained AI assistant that
lives entirely on a USB stick and runs fully offline on Windows.

The whole point is that it can't leak what it never sends. Put the machine in airplane
mode, unplug the network — it
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Opposite Of Drawdown: US Mulls Expanding Nuclear Weapons Deployments In Europe
item.description:
Opposite Of Drawdown: US Mulls Expanding Nuclear Weapons Deployments In Europe

The White House has been talking about reducing America's military presence across the European continent, amid long-running Trump complaints over lack of NATO burden-sharing. There are even plans to draw down 5,000 US troops from Germany on a permanent basis (though for now it appears thousands are just being moved to Poland).

Such a military 'reduction' would be welcomed by Moscow, howe
item.content:encoded:
Opposite Of Drawdown: US Mulls Expanding Nuclear Weapons Deployments In Europe

The White House has been talking about reducing America's military presence across the European continent, amid long-running Trump complaints over lack of NATO burden-sharing. There are even plans to draw down 5,000 US troops from Germany on a permanent basis (though for now it appears thousands are just being moved to Poland).

Such a military 'reduction' would be welcomed by Moscow, howe
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: I can't believe how normalized it is that email providers can just read your emails in full
item.description: I might've been stupid but it just never dawned on me that Gmail for example can just read all of your emails. First of all, isn't that a security risk? (Data breaches) The data is extracted from secure places and passed through a changing pipeline which will have some vulnerabilities and places for data to leak. Google's always trying out new thin
item.content:encoded: I might've been stupid but it just never dawned on me that Gmail for example can just read all of your emails. First of all, isn't that a security risk? (Data breaches) The data is extracted from secure places and passed through a changing pipeline which will have some vulnerabilities and places for data to leak. Google's always trying out new thin
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Personal privacy for HNI
item.description:
Personal Digital Protection and Privacy for HNI

I currently serve as a mid-level cybersecurity analyst and the inaugural cybersecurity hire at an Indian company. The CEO, an ultra-high-net-worth individual, has requested my assistance with personal cybersecurity and privacy for himself and his family, who primarily use Apple products.

My initial recommendation
item.content:encoded:
Personal Digital Protection and Privacy for HNI

I currently serve as a mid-level cybersecurity analyst and the inaugural cybersecurity hire at an Indian company. The CEO, an ultra-high-net-worth individual, has requested my assistance with personal cybersecurity and privacy for himself and his family, who primarily use Apple products.

My initial recommendation
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Did anyone here go to Sandy Hook During the shooting or know/ ever meet anyone at the school at the time
item.description:
I haven't heard much from any children who would be adults now, who went to the school during the shooting. You hear from Columbine survivors often. Just interested to hear first hand accounts from anyone there.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I haven't heard much from any children who would be adults now, who went to the school during the shooting. You hear from Columbine survivors often. Just interested to hear first hand accounts from anyone there.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Jordan Ames

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Iran's Largest Crypto Exchange
item.description:
US Treasury Sanctions Iran's Largest Crypto Exchange

Peace talks appear stalled, or even halted completely - despite President Trump's denials - and the US Department of Treasury is still swinging hard, as part of the ongoing effort to bring about economic collapse in Iran and 'solve' the Hormuz Strait shipping crisis.

In the latest installment of Washington's economic whac-a-mole, the US on Tuesday unveiled sanctions on Iran's biggest cryptocurrency exchang
item.content:encoded:
US Treasury Sanctions Iran's Largest Crypto Exchange

Peace talks appear stalled, or even halted completely - despite President Trump's denials - and the US Department of Treasury is still swinging hard, as part of the ongoing effort to bring about economic collapse in Iran and 'solve' the Hormuz Strait shipping crisis.

In the latest installment of Washington's economic whac-a-mole, the US on Tuesday unveiled sanctions on Iran's biggest cryptocurrency exchang
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be

item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: California Is Winning The Digital Privacy Fight (From 2015)
item.description: One decade ago, California passed the gold standard regulation of law enforcement access to digital data in the United States. The law is still the strongest in the country. It requires that a California government entity get a warrant to search electronic devices or compel access to any electronic information, like email, text messages, do
item.content:encoded: One decade ago, California passed the gold standard regulation of law enforcement access to digital data in the United States. The law is still the strongest in the country. It requires that a California government entity get a warrant to search electronic devices or compel access to any electronic information, like email, text messages, do
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Bitcoin just dropped 6% in a day while ai stocks hit all time highs. Nobody is asking the obvious question.
item.description:
Yesterday btc tumbled below $67k, down nearly 6% in a single session which is lowest level since april. Spot bitcoin etfs recorded $1.42 billion in outflows as investor sentiment turned risk off and meanwhile nvidia closed at an ath, microsoft is up 34% this year and the ai infrastructure trade is printing.

Which means money rotated,investors are moving out of crypto
item.content:encoded:
Yesterday btc tumbled below $67k, down nearly 6% in a single session which is lowest level since april. Spot bitcoin etfs recorded $1.42 billion in outflows as investor sentiment turned risk off and meanwhile nvidia closed at an ath, microsoft is up 34% this year and the ai infrastructure trade is printing.

Which means money rotated,investors are moving out of crypto
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns
item.description:
Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns

that reporters will no longer have open access to the War Department’s public affairs office after the space was redesignated as a classified facility to accommodate staff handling sensitive material.

The announcement marks the latest effort by the Pete Hegseth-led War Department
item.content:encoded:
Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns

that reporters will no longer have open access to the War Department’s public affairs office after the space was redesignated as a classified facility to accommodate staff handling sensitive material.

The announcement marks the latest effort by the Pete Hegseth-led War Department
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: This is kind of strange.
item.description: Rule 10 Submission Statement: Albania has significant ties to human trafficking; while it serves primarily as a major source country, and to a lesser extent a transit and destination point, for human trafficking. Organized criminal networks frequently traffic Albanian adults and children into forced labor and the sex trade across Europe
item.content:encoded: Rule 10 Submission Statement: Albania has significant ties to human trafficking; while it serves primarily as a major source country, and to a lesser extent a transit and destination point, for human trafficking. Organized criminal networks frequently traffic Albanian adults and children into forced labor and the sex trade across Europe
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs
item.description:
Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs

Summary:

  • Trump insists reports that Iran & US have not been talking for days is 'fake news'; Rubio also tells Congress talks are ongoing, despite fresh Iranian denials, and even claims the nuclear file is part of it.
  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forw
item.content:encoded:
Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs

Summary:

  • Trump insists reports that Iran & US have not been talking for days is 'fake news'; Rubio also tells Congress talks are ongoing, despite fresh Iranian denials, and even claims the nuclear file is part of it.
  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forw
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App
item.description:
Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App

Tencent shares jumped the most since late 2022 after an reported, citing sources. After that, Tencent plans to test the agent on a small group of outside users before initiating a phased rollout, the newspaper said.

Shares of Tencent closed up 10.5%, its biggest jump since November 2022, with turnover at the highest in more than a year. The stock gave a boost t
item.content:encoded:
Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App

Tencent shares jumped the most since late 2022 after an reported, citing sources. After that, Tencent plans to test the agent on a small group of outside users before initiating a phased rollout, the newspaper said.

Shares of Tencent closed up 10.5%, its biggest jump since November 2022, with turnover at the highest in more than a year. The stock gave a boost t
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Illinois HB 5511 Bill, a bill requiring OS level age verification, passes both houses
item.description: The bill, to see for yourself: I have not seen news that the governor has signed it yet, so if you are an Illinois resident concerned about this, then contact him stating your opposition, but be prepared for this to pass and be in effect in January 1st of next year. If it does pass demand a repeal to your lawmakers, protest, and fund lawsuits towards it. Maybe even tr
item.content:encoded: The bill, to see for yourself: I have not seen news that the governor has signed it yet, so if you are an Illinois resident concerned about this, then contact him stating your opposition, but be prepared for this to pass and be in effect in January 1st of next year. If it does pass demand a repeal to your lawmakers, protest, and fund lawsuits towards it. Maybe even tr
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Tiktok just age restricted me for nothing and I don't want to verify my id
item.description:
I can't even appeal also, the age verification thing is deadass everywhere. Im afraid if I do they gone upload my stuff to some secret dark web service.

Tiktok itself is already very unsecured

I just use that app to slide into females dms and I can't do this because of this

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I can't even appeal also, the age verification thing is deadass everywhere. Im afraid if I do they gone upload my stuff to some secret dark web service.

Tiktok itself is already very unsecured

I just use that app to slide into females dms and I can't do this because of this

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Sens. Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren push Labor Dept. to scrap proposed rule that brings crypto into 401(k) plans
item.description:
From the article;

In a letter dated June 1 to Acting Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling, the senators and top Democrat of the House Committee on Education and Workforce, Rep. Robert "Bobby" Scott, said the proposed rule would expose people to more risk.

"The proposed rule would establish a so-called safe harbor for fiduciaries who o
item.content:encoded:
From the article;

In a letter dated June 1 to Acting Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling, the senators and top Democrat of the House Committee on Education and Workforce, Rep. Robert "Bobby" Scott, said the proposed rule would expose people to more risk.

"The proposed rule would establish a so-called safe harbor for fiduciaries who o
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: A walking tour of surveillance infrastructure in Seattle (2020)
item.description: A walking tour of surveillance infrastructure in Seattle (2020)
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance
item.description:
Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance

Shake Shack plunged on Tuesday, hitting its lowest levels since November 2023, after the burger chain slashed second-quarter guidance only about a month after issuing it.

Baird analyst David Tarantino said the new outlook is viewed as "incrementally negative" for Shake Shack.

Tarantino noted that management had set an "unusually high bar" for 2Q comparable perfo
item.content:encoded:
Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance

Shake Shack plunged on Tuesday, hitting its lowest levels since November 2023, after the burger chain slashed second-quarter guidance only about a month after issuing it.

Baird analyst David Tarantino said the new outlook is viewed as "incrementally negative" for Shake Shack.

Tarantino noted that management had set an "unusually high bar" for 2Q comparable perfo
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: 'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets
item.description:
'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets

“Over the past week, we acquired 26,497 ETH,” Bitmine Immersion Technologies Chair, Tom Lee,
item.content:encoded:
'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets

“Over the past week, we acquired 26,497 ETH,” Bitmine Immersion Technologies Chair, Tom Lee,
item.dc:creator: Casey North
